description: Full mobile adaptation of all webapp pages following Daily Journal reference pattern

userStories.title: Protected Layout Mobile Polish
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the app shell (sidebar, header) to work well on mobile so that navigation is seamless.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify shadcn Sidebar component responsive behavior works correctly
Main content padding responsive: p-4 sm:p-6 in layout.tsx
Account selector dropdown usable on mobile (proper touch targets)
userStories.notes: Responsive padding p-4 sm:p-6 added to layout.tsx. Touch targets improved for account selector and dropdown items (min-h-[44px]). Sidebar component already has excellent mobile support with Sheet drawer on mobile.

userStories.title: Dashboard Mobile Responsive Grid
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the dashboard stats grid to stack properly on mobile so that I can view my trading metrics without horizontal scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Stats grid uses responsive classes: grid gap-3 grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5
Performance summary grid stacks on mobile: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2
StartJournalHero stacks vertically on mobile with flex-col sm:flex-row
Button text variants: 'Start' on mobile (sm:hidden), 'Start My Journal' on desktop (hidden sm:inline)
Responsive padding on cards where needed
userStories.notes: Stats grid made responsive with grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5. StartJournalHero uses flex-col sm:flex-row with responsive padding. Button text uses conditional spans for mobile/desktop variants. Page title responsive with text-2xl sm:text-3xl. Performance summary key metrics grid stacks on mobile.

userStories.title: Journal List Mobile Card View
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the trade list to display in a mobile-friendly card format so that I can browse and manage my trades on my phone.
acceptanceCriteria: Add useMediaQuery hook for mobile detection
On mobile: Replace table with card-based list view showing key fields (symbol, direction, P&L, date)
Card view includes tap to navigate to trade detail
Filter panel collapses into a Sheet drawer on mobile (button to open filters)
Search bar remains visible at top
Bulk actions bar adapts to mobile (icons only or smaller buttons)
Column config hidden on mobile (not needed for card view)
Trash tab also uses card view on mobile
userStories.notes: Uses existing useIsMobile hook (breakpoint 768px). Mobile card view shows symbol, direction, P&L, date, R-multiple, exit reason, rating, and reviewed status. Filter button opens Sheet drawer on right. Bulk actions use icon-only on mobile. ColumnConfig hidden on mobile. TrashCard component for trash tab mobile view. All interactive card areas are semantic buttons with proper a11y.

userStories.title: Trade Detail Mobile Layout
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the trade detail page to show a mobile-friendly layout with a drawer for stats so that I can review trades on my phone.
acceptanceCriteria: Add useMediaQuery hook and sidebarOpen state
Add mobile menu button (md:hidden) in header to open stats drawer
Replace ResizablePanelGroup with Sheet drawer for StatsPanel on mobile
Header actions responsive: hide less important actions on mobile or use icon-only
Dialogs (close trade, delete) work correctly on mobile
userStories.notes: Uses useIsMobile hook for detection. Stats drawer opens from left via Sheet component with BarChart3 icon trigger in header. ContentPanel full-width on mobile. Header made responsive: icon-only for review button, hide Share button, hide Status/Imported badges on mobile. Navigation arrows remain accessible. Dialogs unchanged (work correctly on mobile as Dialog component is already responsive).

userStories.title: New Trade Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want to add trades on mobile so that I can log trades immediately after taking them.
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields stack vertically on mobile
Number inputs have proper mobile keyboards (inputmode='decimal')
Submit button sticky at bottom or easily accessible
userStories.notes: Responsive padding p-3 sm:p-4 on all card sections. Form grids use gap-3 sm:gap-4 for tighter mobile spacing. All number inputs have inputMode='decimal' for proper mobile keyboard. Submit buttons full-width on mobile with w-full sm:w-auto and min-h-[44px] for touch targets. Buttons reversed order on mobile (submit first with flex-col-reverse sm:flex-row). Header text responsive with text-xl sm:text-2xl and description hidden on mobile. Back button has proper touch target (min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px]).

userStories.title: Analytics Page Mobile Layout
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the analytics page to be usable on mobile with a simplified layout so that I can view my trading performance metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Add useMediaQuery hook for mobile detection
Filter controls collapse into Sheet drawer on mobile (button to open filters)
Tab navigation works on mobile (horizontal scroll on tab bar if needed)
Charts resize responsively (AgCharts should handle this)
Stats grids stack: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4
Heatmap components scroll horizontally if needed with overflow-x-auto
Calendar heatmap shows in scrollable container on mobile
Simplify dense data displays for mobile readability
userStories.notes: Uses useIsMobile hook for mobile detection. Filter controls convert to Sheet drawer on mobile with Filter button. Tab bar has horizontal scroll with touch-friendly targets (min-h-[40px]). Stats grids use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4. HourHeatmap has overflow-x-auto with min-w-[320px]. CalendarHeatmap summary stats wrap with flex-wrap. ChartTerminal has responsive padding (p-3 sm:p-4). Header has responsive text sizes and description hidden on mobile. Responsive spacing throughout all tabs.

userStories.title: AI Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the AI assistant page to work on mobile so that I can get AI-powered insights on my phone.
acceptanceCriteria: Review current AI page structure and apply responsive patterns
Chat/input interface works on mobile (full-width input)
Any side panels convert to Sheet drawers if present
userStories.notes: Responsive spacing throughout (space-y-4 sm:space-y-6). Header made responsive: text-2xl sm:text-3xl title, description hidden on mobile, API Keys button icon-only on mobile. API Key notice banner stacks vertically on mobile with full-width Settings button. Terminal header dots smaller on mobile, terminal path hidden on mobile. Chat content padding responsive (p-3 sm:p-4), example query buttons have min-h-[36px] touch targets. Messages use smaller text on mobile (text-xs sm:text-sm) with break-words for long content. Input area has min-h-[44px] for touch-friendly input and send button.

userStories.title: Settings Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the settings page to display properly on mobile so that I can manage my account settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Form layouts stack on mobile: flex-col sm:flex-row
Buttons properly sized for touch (min 44px height)
Any tabs or sections work on mobile
userStories.notes: Tab bar has horizontal scroll with touch-friendly targets (min-h-[40px], smaller text on mobile). Header responsive (text-2xl sm:text-3xl, description hidden on mobile). All card sections have responsive padding (p-4 sm:p-6). Trading sessions row stacks on mobile with time/color controls on separate row. Account cards stack on mobile with badges wrapping. Action buttons have min-h-[36px] min-w-[36px] for touch targets. API key inputs have min-h-[44px]. Save footer stacks vertically on mobile with full-width button. TagManager also updated with responsive header and touch-friendly buttons.

userStories.title: Import Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the import page to work on mobile so that I can upload trades from my phone if needed.
acceptanceCriteria: File upload area works on mobile (tap to select)
Results/preview table scrolls horizontally or converts to cards
userStories.notes: Uses useIsMobile hook for mobile detection. Progress stepper has horizontal scroll with smaller step indicators on mobile. Header responsive with text-xl sm:text-2xl title, description hidden on mobile, back button with 44px touch target. Select account step has responsive padding, touch-friendly dropdown (min-h-[44px]), full-width continue button. Upload area has smaller padding on mobile (p-6 vs p-12), mobile-optimized text ('Tap to select' vs 'Drop file'), touch-friendly tab triggers. Mapping section has grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 for column selectors, all SelectTrigger items have min-h-[44px] touch targets. Preview converts table to card view on mobile showing symbol, direction, qty, entry/exit prices. Navigation buttons full-width with flex-col-reverse sm:flex-row. Complete step has responsive padding and full-width buttons stacking on mobile.

userStories.title: Strategies List Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want to view and manage my trading strategies on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Strategy cards/list stacks vertically on mobile
Strategy actions (edit, delete) accessible via dropdown
userStories.notes: Uses useIsMobile hook for mobile detection. Header responsive with text-xl sm:text-2xl title, description hidden on mobile. New Strategy button icon-only on mobile with 44px touch target. Performance Comparison table has horizontal scroll on mobile (-mx-4 px-4 overflow-x-auto with min-w-[600px]). Strategy cards grid responsive: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 with gap-3 sm:gap-4. StrategyCard updated: isMobile prop makes dropdown always visible (no hover required), responsive padding p-4 sm:p-5, smaller text sizes on mobile, touch-friendly dropdown items (min-h-[44px]). Empty state responsive with smaller padding and icons. Delete dialog buttons have proper touch targets and stack vertically on mobile.

userStories.title: Strategy Detail/Edit Pages Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want to view and edit strategy details on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields stack vertically on mobile
userStories.notes: Strategy Detail page: useIsMobile hook added. Header responsive with truncating title, back button with 44px touch target, Duplicate button icon-only on mobile, Delete dialog footer stacks vertically. Stats grid responsive: grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 with smaller text/padding on mobile. Form card has responsive padding (p-4 sm:p-6). New Strategy page: same header pattern with responsive title and hidden description on mobile. StrategyForm: section tabs have horizontal scroll on mobile with smaller touch-friendly tabs, color picker uses flex-wrap with larger touch targets, rules section stacks vertically with delete button repositioned, submit button full-width on mobile. RiskConfig/ScalingConfig/TrailingConfig: all grids use grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2, all inputs have min-h-[44px] and inputMode for mobile keyboards, all action buttons have proper touch targets.

userStories.title: Marketing Landing Page Mobile Adaptation
userStories.description: As a mobile user visiting the landing page, I want a properly responsive experience so that I can learn about the product and sign up.
acceptanceCriteria: Header/nav collapses to hamburger menu on mobile
Hero section stacks vertically, responsive text sizes
Ticker component doesn't cause horizontal scroll
userStories.notes: Navbar: hamburger menu using Sheet drawer on mobile (md:hidden), simplified auth (just 'Start' button + user icon on mobile). Hero: responsive text sizes (text-3xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl), stats grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4, CTA buttons full-width on mobile w-full sm:w-auto, terminal preview responsive with smaller elements on mobile. Features: responsive grid sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3, visual elements hidden on mobile for cleaner look, responsive section padding py-16 sm:py-24 lg:py-32. AI Showcase: query buttons horizontal scroll on mobile, terminal content responsive text/padding, trust badges stack vertically on mobile. Pricing: BYOK banner stacks vertically, pricing cards grid gap-4 sm:gap-6 lg:grid-cols-3, Pro card shown first on mobile using order-first lg:order-none. CTA: responsive section padding, buttons full-width on mobile, trust elements stack vertically. Footer: link columns 3-col grid on mobile, responsive spacing/text sizes, social links have 44px touch targets. Ticker uses overflow-hidden (already doesn't cause horizontal scroll).

userStories.title: Fix Marketing Navbar Mobile Menu
userStories.description: As a mobile user on the landing page, I want the hamburger menu to only show auth actions so that the interface is cleaner and more purposeful.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove section navigation links (Features, AI, Pricing) from mobile Sheet drawer
Keep only auth actions: Login/Get Started buttons when signed out
Keep only Dashboard link when signed in
Hamburger button remains visible on mobile (md:hidden)
Sheet drawer styling consistent with Terminal design

userStories.title: Fix Trade Detail Chart Interval Buttons Mobile
userStories.description: As a mobile user viewing a trade detail, I want the chart interval selector to use a dropdown on mobile so that controls don't overflow or overlap.
acceptanceCriteria: Add useIsMobile hook to TradingViewChart component
On mobile: Replace TimeframeSelector buttons with a Select/Dropdown showing current interval
Dropdown shows all intervals (1m, 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h) as options
Selected interval displayed in dropdown trigger
On desktop: Keep existing button row (no change)
Controls bar (absolute top-3 left-3) layout remains clean on mobile
Fit button remains accessible on mobile
